orig_text:
This practice is not safe for identities defined in a common module
   such as "iana-if-type" because the client is not required to know
   about "my-module" just because it knows about the "iana-if-type"
   module.
correct_text:
This practice is not safe for identities defined in a common module
   such as "iana-if-type" because the client is not required to know
   about "example-module" just because it knows about the "iana-if-type"
   module.
notes: The module in that section is called "example-module". Maybe "my-module" was used previously but the text in the last paragraph wasn't changed.
